char_overview: A perfectionist artisan whose multi-morphing weapons are sought after by elite 狩灵.
char_looks: 173cm. Short black hair Black eyes, often shadowed by fatigue. Wears a black top and black shorts daily, switching to heavy-duty protective gear when working outside. None.
char_flaws: Works herself past exhaustion; hates haggling with clients.; Talks to her tools; falls asleep mid-sentence when exhausted; unconsciously uses machine metaphors in daily conversation.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-磁流: Controls electron flow within metal using 灵力, magnetizing or demagnetizing at will, Used primarily in crafting.
char_mission: Craft weapons gated by deep pockets and deeper skill, selling to anyone who proves they have both.
char_origin: Awakened her 灵力 during university. After graduating in mechanical design, she accepted the 狩灵协会 rating, then apprenticed at a workshop before establishing her own: 鹤望兰工坊.

char_relationships.千乐: Commissioned 美工刀, her most complex multi-mode weapon. Still drafts improvement proposals for him.
char_relationships.奏: Commissioned 暴行 with split-blade functionality. Once she understood the brief, delivered a single finished piece with no revisions. An ideal client: specifications stated once, no indecision, no late-stage redesigns.
